tasks.name: Static Heading Read
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://example.com and report the main heading of the page exactly.

tasks.name: Wikipedia Fact Lookup
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Moon and report the Moon's average orbital speed from the infobox.

tasks.name: GitHub Repo Metadata
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://github.com/torvalds/linux and report the repository's approximate star count, primary language, and license.
tasks.judgeHint: Language should be C and the answer must include a star count and a license value pulled from the page.

tasks.name: Wikipedia Table Read
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_countries_and_dependencies_by_population and report the top 3 countries by population.

tasks.name: Link Follow Extract
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ada_Lovelace, follow the link to Charles Babbage, and report his birth date.

tasks.name: Repo File Navigate
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://github.com/torvalds/linux, open the root Makefile, and report the VERSION and PATCHLEVEL values defined near the top.
tasks.judgeHint: The answer must include both VERSION and PATCHLEVEL values and should clearly indicate they came from the Makefile.

tasks.name: Multi-Page Comparison
tasks.prompt: Navigate to the Wikipedia articles for Python (programming language) and JavaScript and report who designed each language.

tasks.name: Public Search Then Click
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Main_Page, use the search box to find 'Turing Award', and report the first recipient of the Turing Award.

tasks.name: Deep Public Extraction
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_Nobel_laureates_in_Physics and report the winners for the 3 most recent years listed.
tasks.judgeHint: Pass only if all co-laureates are included for each of the 3 most recent years.

tasks.name: Error Recovery
tasks.prompt: Navigate to https://httpbin.org/status/404 and report the error encountered. Then navigate to https://httpbin.org/html and report the page content.
